title: The Ley Lines & the Planetary Grid
summary: The Earth's electromagnetic acupuncture system — power source for portals, highway for the Jumproom Network, symbolized by the Dragon — running through sixteen sessions.
markdown:
**The Ley Lines** are the record's infrastructure layer for the planet itself: an
electromagnetic grid the sessions describe as the Earth's own circulatory system, tapped by
every civilization — human, secret, and otherwise — that has needed power or passage.
Unimetrix 1 gives the cleanest definition in the March 26, 2020 session: the Ley-line
structure is *"a Planetary acupuncture point (system)"* — and adds a decoding the record
returns to repeatedly: *"The Dragon symbolises the Ley-line structure, the grid-point
system."* Where a dragon appears in myth or heraldry, the record reads a map of the grid.

The grid is first a **power source**. The [Angkor Wat quantum computer](/lore/quantum-computer/)
is described as *"opening portal using electromagnetic grid. What you call ley line as power
source. Allow interaction with all parallel dimension."* Ancient super-chips *"made of
stone"* are *"powered by the electromagnetic grid-points that you Humans call the Ley-line
Grid."* The recounted [Atlantis](/lore/atlantis/) ran its crystal generators on the same
lines, and where major lines intersect, the sessions place *"interdimensional portal or
planetary chakra."*

It is also a **road network**. The [secret space program's](/lore/secret-space-program/)
Jumproom Network is said to *"follow Space-time through the Ley-lines, the Galactic
Ley-lines. And the off-world Ley-lines"* — because in the record's cosmology the grid does
not stop at the atmosphere: stars connect through *"transconduits, which are the Ley-lines...
of different stars,"* with the Sun serving as a [stargate](/lore/stargate/). The same
session offers a folk etymology — ley as *"Field or Meadow-Line"* — for a system it treats
as anything but pastoral.

Contested territory, naturally, is part of the picture: audiences ask whether hostile races
are given *"access to invade certain Ley-lines,"* and the grid appears in the darker
accounts of control structures as something that can be occupied, dammed, or tapped — the
same wire that powers a healing temple powering something else.

*See also: [Stargates & Stargate Travel](/lore/stargate/) ·
[Crystal Technology](/lore/crystal-technology/) · [Agartha](/lore/agartha/)*
